<!-- Thanks for contributing to Lerret. Fill out each section so reviewers can move quickly. -->

## Summary

<!-- A short paragraph: what does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — adding/updating tests
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, build
- [ ] ci — CI configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Related issue(s) linked
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-visible behavior changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `## [Unreleased]` updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] CI is passing

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot or short clip. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — design tradeoffs, follow-ups, things deliberately left out. -->
